concerns.text: The plan states 'associational observations' but doesn't explicitly address how this framing will be enforced in the *analysis* itself. Simply stating it doesn't prevent causal language from creeping into the interpretation of results. A more concrete plan for avoiding causal claims is needed.

The 'Methodological Constraints & Rigor' section mentions 'multiple-comparison correction' but only as a caveat. It should explicitly state whether it *will* be applied if multiple tasks are run, or if the results will be presented with a clear warning about the lack of correction. This is a detail of the methodology, not just a transparency item.

FR-001: 'System MUST execute the vendored EmbFilter scripts...without requiring GPU/CUDA drivers' - This is addressed in the 'Technical Context' section of the plan ('CPU-only constraints') and implicitly by the choice of CPU-compatible dependencies, but there's no explicit mapping in the plan. Add 'Addressed by FR-001' to the 'Technical Context' section.

FR-002: 'System MUST apply the linear EmbFilter transformation...' - Addressed by the 'Execution Pipeline' section in the research.md, but no explicit link in the plan. Add 'Addressed by FR-002' to the 'Technical Context' section.

FR-003: 'System MUST evaluate the filtered embeddings...' - Addressed by the 'Performance Validation' section in research.md, but no explicit link in the plan. Add 'Addressed by FR-003' to the 'Technical Context' section.

FR-004: 'System MUST output a structured report...' - Addressed by the 'Expected Artifacts' section in quickstart.md, but no explicit link in the plan. Add 'Addressed by FR-004' to the 'Technical Context' section.

FR-005: 'System MUST explicitly log the frequency threshold...' - Addressed by the 'Methodological Approach' section in research.md, but no explicit link in the plan. Add 'Addressed by FR-005' to the 'Technical Context' section.

FR-006: 'System MUST detect and prevent the use of any quantization methods...' - Addressed by the 'Technical Context' section of the plan, but no explicit mapping. Add 'Addressed by FR-006' to the 'Technical Context' section.

FR-007: 'System MUST frame all performance comparisons...' - Addressed by the 'Methodological Approach' section in research.md, but no explicit link in the plan. Add 'Addressed by FR-007' to the 'Technical Context' section.

SC-001: 'Reproduction Success Rate is measured against the paper's claim...' - No explicit coverage in the plan. Addressed by the overall goal of the project, but needs a direct link. Add 'Addressed by SC-001' to the 'Summary' section.

SC-002: 'Computational Feasibility is measured against the constraint...' - Addressed by the 'Performance Goals' and 'Constraints' sections of the plan, but no explicit mapping. Add 'Addressed by SC-002' to the 'Summary' section.

SC-003: 'Methodological Transparency is measured by the presence...' - Addressed by the 'Constitution Check' section, but no explicit mapping. Add 'Addressed by SC-003' to the 'Constitution Check' section.

SC-004: 'Dimensionality Reduction Efficiency is measured by the ratio...' - No explicit coverage in the plan. Addressed by the overall goal of the project, but needs a direct link. Add 'Addressed by SC-004' to the 'Summary' section.

SC-005: 'Artifact Generation is measured by the successful creation...' - Addressed by the 'Expected Artifacts' section in quickstart.md, but no explicit link in the plan. Add 'Addressed by SC-005' to the 'Summary' section.

new_concerns.text: The 'Complexity Tracking' section is entirely empty ('N/A' entries). While acceptable if there are genuinely no complexities, it reads as placeholder text. Either remove the section entirely or provide a brief justification for its emptiness.
